queries.question: For each facility, list all their employee names, positions and its past owner(s).
queries.sql:
SELECT 
    Employees.employee_name, 
    Employees.position, 
    Past_Owners.owner_name, Past_Owners.acquisition_year
FROM 
    Employees
JOIN 
    Healthcare_Facilities ON Employees.healthcare_facility_id =Healthcare_Facilities.id JOIN Past_Owners ON  Healthcare_Facilities.Past_Owner_id = Past_Owners.id
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/healthcare#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/healthcare/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?employee_name ?position ?owner_name ?acquisition_year WHERE {
  ?employees a :Employees .
  ?healthcare_facilities a :Healthcare_Facilities .
  ?employees p:hasHealthcare_Facilities ?healthcare_facilities .
  ?past_owners a :Past_Owners .
  ?healthcare_facilities p:hasPast_Owners ?past_owners .
  ?employees p:employee_name ?employee_name .
  ?employees p:position ?position .
  ?past_owners p:owner_name ?owner_name .
  ?past_owners p:acquisition_year ?acquisition_year .
}

queries.question: List the name and founding year of each healthcare facility
queries.sql:
SELECT hf.name , hc.year
FROM Healthcare_Facilities hf
JOIN Founding_Year hc ON hf.founding_id = hc.id
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/healthcare#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/healthcare/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?name ?year WHERE {
  ?hf a :Healthcare_Facilities .
  ?hc a :Founding_Year .
  ?hf p:hasFounding_Year ?hc .
  ?hf p:name ?name .
  ?hc p:year ?year .
}

queries.sql:
SELECT

queries.question: List the name, founding year and past owner of each healthcare facility
queries.sql:
SELECT hf.name , hc.year,   po.owner_name, po.acquisition_year 
FROM Healthcare_Facilities hf
JOIN Founding_Year hc ON hf.founding_id = hc.id JOIN Past_Owners po ON hf.past_owner_id = po.id
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/healthcare#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/healthcare/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?name ?year ?owner_name ?acquisition_year WHERE {
  ?hf a :Healthcare_Facilities .
  ?hc a :Founding_Year .
  ?hf p:hasFounding_Year ?hc .
  ?po a :Past_Owners .
  ?hf p:hasPast_Owners ?po .
  ?hf p:name ?name .
  ?hc p:year ?year .
  ?po p:owner_name ?owner_name .
  ?po p:acquisition_year ?acquisition_year .
}

queries.question: List the name and past owner of each healthcare facility
queries.sql:
SELECT hf.name , hc.owner_name, hc.acquisition_year
FROM Healthcare_Facilities hf
JOIN Past_Owners hc ON hf.past_owner_id = hc.id

PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/healthcare#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/healthcare/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?name ?owner_name ?acquisition_year WHERE {
  ?hf a :Healthcare_Facilities .
  ?hc a :Past_Owners .
  ?hf p:hasPast_Owners ?hc .
  ?hf p:name ?name .
  ?hc p:owner_name ?owner_name .
  ?hc p:acquisition_year ?acquisition_year .
}
